summary: v112 adds named object-property closure APIs for exactAcyclicHomotopyIsoClosure and boundedExactAcyclicHomotopyObject: isomorphism closure, zero containment, and bounded-side shift stability. Product remains nonterminal because bounded/exact-acyclic closed2 is not unconditional, direct bounded left/right calculus and triangulated transfer to Dbounded are not proved, and no stable infinity-category structure is constructed.
